ogTitle: Rochedale vs Rochedale South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rochedale and Rochedale South.
heading: Rochedale vs Rochedale South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rochedale, Queensland and Rochedale South, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rochedale South has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Rochedale (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rochedale or Rochedale South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rochedale has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Rochedale South scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rochedale scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Rochedale South scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rochedale or Rochedale South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rochedale South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
